title: 11 on the 11th
excerpt: 1. Creating Keepsakes January/February issue hits newsstands today. 2. If you prefer the digital version, here you go . 3. Did a 5 minute chat with Scrapbooking Memories Australia. 4. My mom and I are in Maui -it's her first…
body:
1. Creating Keepsakes January/February issue hits newsstands today.

2. If you prefer the digital version, here you go.

3. Did a 5 minute chat with Scrapbooking Memories Australia. 

4. My mom and I are in Maui -it's her first time to Hawaii. (Wish you were here? See #11 for a way to get in on the fun without having to pack a bag or slather on sunscreen.)

5. You can follow mommy's adventures on Instagram.

6. You can also follow my adventures on Instagram. We've been using the #BPCmaui

7. It's nice here.

8. Proof:

That was last night's sunset from our balcony.

9. I didn't use a filter, but I did use Photosynth. It's free!

10. I find it easier to use than the panoramic option on the iPhone.

11. Tomorrow is 12/12/12 and there's still time to sign up for Big Picture Classes at home portion of the event. (I blogged about it here 2 weeks ago.) We will be broadcasting live throughout the day. If you can't make it for the entire day, the video feed will be archived for future viewing in the classroom. You can still get $5 off (bringing 12/12/12 at home to just $15.12) with the promo code: amy12 || Sign up here, see you tomorrow!
